prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game system art, square illustration
Primary request: premium return streak reward art for Vavarda, representing a daily ritual chain that must be maintained
Scene/background: dark ceremonial hall with suspended clocks, drifting rune embers, subtle star-like particles, long ritual perspective
Subject: central floating daily streak sigil or chained crystal calendar relic, glowing with layered violet and pale gold light, clearly representing continuity and daily return rewards
Style/medium: premium dark-fantasy feature illustration for a mobile game, elegant, readable, atmospheric, polished
Composition/framing: centered relic or ritual emblem, square crop, balanced symmetry, strong focal point, no clutter
Lighting/mood: rewarding, persistent, slightly sacred, long-term progression energy rather than combat
Color palette: deep plum, black, pale gold, violet glow, restrained silver accents
Materials/textures: rune crystal, metal chain motifs, arcane dust, sacred smoke
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, no human character, make it feel like a premium daily streak reward feature, not a generic chest
